dialog.stepLabel: Xiaoju: "Fantastic. These should be more than enough! Thanks for your..."

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: Fantastic. These should be more than enough! Thanks for your hard work!

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: Well, you’ve come all this way. How about something to eat? It’s on the house! Give my culinary skills a taste!

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: If you’re not in a hurry, you can also stay and play with the cats a bit more!
